title: Knowledge Synthesis Pipeline: Destill → Cross → Synthesize → Verify → Deliver
essence: Nexus Garden Card Crossing + Silent Director Synthesis + Demo-First Verification bilden eine Knowledge Pipeline: Distillation → Crossing → Synthese → Verifikation → Delivery.
steps: DISTILL: Chat History → Strukturierte Cards (Nexus Garden Pattern)
CROSS: Verbindungen zwischen Cards aus verschiedenen Domains finden
SYNTHESIZE: Silent Director orchestriert Multi-Model Synthese
VERIFY: Demo-First Pattern — Referenz erstellen vor Delivery
DELIVER: Synthese-Card mit Provenance Links zu Sources

evidence.notes: GLM5: AICOS Registry lebt diese Pipeline — meta-self-referential
